title: Surreal Clip Generator Agent Output Schema
description:
JSON output schema for the surreal-clip-generator agent. Extends agent-output-base.schema.json using allOf composition. Enables orchestration hooks to parse results, chain video generation into workflows, and validate consistent, machine-readable outputs.

Example valid payload:
{
  "agent_id": "video-gen-001",
  "agent_type": "video-generation",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-06T12:00:00.000Z",
  "session_id": "sess_abc123",
  "schema_version": "1.0.0",
  "status": "success",
  "generation_result": {
    "job_id": "pred_abc123",
    "provider": "replicate-luma",
    "status": "succeeded",
    "output_path": "/tmp/video-output/demo-001.mp4",
    "duration_seconds": 10
  },
  "prompt_used": "A cinematic shot of a product reveal...",
  "iterations": 1,
  "nextAction": { "type": "none" },
  "metadata": { "execution_time_ms": 45000, "tools_used": ["replicate-luma"] },
  "results": { "agent_type": "video-generation" }
}

Example invalid payload (missing required field 'generation_result'):
{
  "agent_id": "video-gen-002",
  "agent_type": "video-generation",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-06T12:00:00.000Z",
  "status": "success"
}

status.description: Overall execution status of the surreal clip generator agent

generation_result.description: Video generation job result including provider details and output location

job_id.description: Provider-specific job identifier for tracking and retrieval

provider.description: Video generation provider used for this job

status.description: Job status from the video generation provider

output_path.description: Local filesystem path to the downloaded video file

duration_seconds.description: Duration of the generated video in seconds

prompt_used.description: The optimized prompt sent to the video generation provider. May differ from original user input after prompt engineering.
examples: A cinematic drone shot of a mountain landscape at sunset, 4K quality, smooth camera movement

provider_selection_rationale.description: Explanation of why this specific provider was selected over alternatives. Useful for debugging and workflow optimization.
examples: Selected replicate-luma for its superior handling of product shots and faster generation time

iterations.description: Number of generation attempts made before achieving final result. Useful for tracking retry behavior.

metadata.description: Surreal clip generation specific metadata including provider timing and quality metrics

execution_time_ms.description: Total time taken for video generation in milliseconds (includes API calls, polling, download)

tools_used.description: List of MCP tools and services used during execution

context_sources.description: Context sources consulted for prompt optimization

provider_response_time_ms.description: Time spent waiting for provider to complete generation (excludes download)

video_fps.description: Frames per second of generated video

file_size_bytes.description: Size of the output video file in bytes

nextAction.description: Orchestration instructions for workflow chaining. Video generation typically chains to post-processing, review, or completes.

type.description: Type of next action to perform

agent_type.description: Agent type to spawn when type=spawn_agent

agent_name.description: Specific agent name to spawn for post-processing workflows

priority.description: Priority level for the next action

payload.description: Data payload for the next action

runDir.description: Gallery run directory path (e.g., .claude/video/surreal/video-20260209-melting-clocks) where surreal-clip-compositor archives final artifacts

video_path.description: Path to generated video for downstream processing

user_question.description: Question to ask user when type=user_input

context.description: Additional context for the next action

results.description: Surreal clip generation specific results container

agent_type.description: Must match top-level agent_type for validation

video_metadata.description: Detailed metadata about the generated video

bitrate_kbps.description: Video bitrate in kilobits per second

audio_present.description: Whether the video contains an audio track

error.description: Error information when status is 'blocked' or 'error'

code.description: Machine-readable error code for programmatic handling

message.description: Human-readable error message explaining what went wrong

provider_error.description: Raw error message from the video generation provider

recoverable.description: Whether this error is recoverable without user intervention

suggested_action.description: Recommended action to resolve the error

examples.prompt_used: A cinematic drone shot of a mountain landscape at sunset, 4K quality, smooth camera movement
examples.provider_selection_rationale: Selected replicate-luma for its superior handling of nature shots

examples.prompt_used: Product showcase video for new smartphone

payload.user_question: Video generation failed after 3 attempts. Would you like to try a different provider?

error.message: Video generation timed out after 3 attempts with runway provider
error.suggested_action: Try with replicate-luma provider which has better timeout handling
